initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_sales_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_revenue
FROM item
INNER JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY item.i_item_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT catalog_sales.cs_item_sk) > 0
    AND COUNT(DISTINCT web_sales.ws_item_sk) > 0;

SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_revenue
FROM 
    item
JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    item.i_item_id
HAVING 
    SUM(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) > 0
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY 
    item.i_item_id;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_sales_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_revenue
FROM 
    item
LEFT JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON item.i_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 1998 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
LEFT JOIN 
    web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 1998 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id
HAVING 
    SUM(CASE WHEN cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) > 0
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id;

initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_revenue
FROM item
LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON item.i_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim ON (catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk OR web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk)
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY item.i_item_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN catalog_sales.cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN web_sales.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY item.i_item_id;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_revenue,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_revenue
FROM 
    item
INNER JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN 
    web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    item.i_item_id
HAVING 
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) > 0
    AND SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) > 0
ORDER BY 
    item.i_item_id;

candidates.sql:
WITH sales_by_channel AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_revenue,
    0 AS web_revenue
  FROM item
  JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
  GROUP BY i_item_id

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    0 AS catalog_revenue,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_revenue
  FROM item
  JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
  GROUP BY i_item_id
)
SELECT 
  i_item_id,
  SUM(catalog_revenue) AS catalog_revenue,
  SUM(web_revenue) AS web_revenue
FROM sales_by_channel
GROUP BY i_item_id
HAVING SUM(catalog_revenue) > 0 AND SUM(web_revenue) > 0
ORDER BY i_item_id;

SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_revenue,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_revenue
FROM 
    item
INNER JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN 
    web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    item.i_item_id
HAVING 
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) > 0
    AND SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) > 0
ORDER BY 
    item.i_item_id;

WITH catalog_sales_1998_11 AS (
    SELECT cs_item_sk, cs_ext_sales_price
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
),
web_sales_1998_11 AS (
    SELECT ws_item_sk, ws_ext_sales_price
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
)
SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(catalog_sales_1998_11.cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales_revenue,
    SUM(web_sales_1998_11.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_revenue
FROM item
JOIN catalog_sales_1998_11 ON catalog_sales_1998_11.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN web_sales_1998_11 ON web_sales_1998_11.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
GROUP BY item.i_item_id;

SELECT 
    item.i_item_id,
    SUM(DISTINCT catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales_revenue,
    SUM(DISTINCT web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_revenue
FROM item
INNER JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY item.i_item_id;
